acp.title: ACP
acp.agentKeyInvalid: Agent key can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
acp.envHelp: Use KEY=VALUE format on each line
acp.toolParseModeRequired: Please select a tool parse mode
acp.stdioBufferLimitHelp: Maximum stdio line buffer size in bytes for the ACP subprocess.
acp.stdioBufferLimitRequired: Please enter a stdio buffer limit
acp.stdioBufferLimitMin: Stdio buffer limit must be at least 1 byte
acp.docsHelp: Open the ACP integration docs and jump to the "How to configure external runners" section
acp.deleteConfirm: Delete this ACP agent? This action cannot be undone.

voiceTranscription.title: Voice Transcription
voiceTranscription.description: Configure how incoming audio and voice messages are handled.
voiceTranscription.audioModeDescription: Choose how voice messages from channels (Discord, Telegram, etc.) are processed before being sent to the model.
voiceTranscription.modeAutoDesc: Transcribe audio to text using the selected transcription provider, then send the text to the model. If transcription is unavailable or disabled, a file-uploaded placeholder is shown instead. Audio is never sent directly to the model in this mode. Works with all models.
voiceTranscription.modeNativeDesc: Send the audio file directly to the model without transcription. This is the only mode that sends audio to the model. Only works with specific audio-capable models (e.g. gpt-4o-audio). Most models do not support this and will reject the message.
voiceTranscription.ffmpegReady: ffmpeg is installed. Audio conversion is available for native mode.
voiceTranscription.ffmpegMissingDesc: Native audio mode requires ffmpeg to convert audio formats (e.g. .ogg to .wav). Install ffmpeg as a system package to enable this mode.
voiceTranscription.providerTypeDescription: Choose the transcription backend. Select Disabled if you do not need voice transcription.
voiceTranscription.providerTypeDisabledDesc: No transcription. Voice messages will show a file-uploaded placeholder.
voiceTranscription.providerTypeWhisperApiDesc: Use an OpenAI-compatible Whisper API endpoint from a configured provider (e.g. OpenAI, Ollama).
voiceTranscription.providerTypeLocalWhisperDesc: Run transcription locally using the openai-whisper Python library. Requires both ffmpeg and openai-whisper to be installed.
voiceTranscription.localWhisperReady: Local Whisper is ready. Both ffmpeg and openai-whisper are installed.
voiceTranscription.localWhisperMissing: Local Whisper is not ready. Missing dependencies must be installed.
voiceTranscription.localWhisperMissingDesc: ffmpeg: {{ffmpeg}} | openai-whisper: {{whisper}}. Install missing dependencies: ffmpeg (system package) and openai-whisper (uv pip install openai-whisper, or install QwenPaw with the [whisper] extra).
voiceTranscription.providerDescription: Select which provider to use for audio transcription via the Whisper API. Only providers with a Whisper-compatible endpoint are shown.
voiceTranscription.noProvidersWarning: No transcription-capable providers found. Configure an OpenAI provider to enable voice transcription.
voiceTranscription.transcriptionInfoDesc: Whisper API transcription uses an OpenAI-compatible /v1/audio/transcriptions endpoint. This requires a configured provider with a Whisper-compatible endpoint — for example, an OpenAI provider. Select a specific provider above to enable transcription.
voiceTranscription.transcriptionInfoDescLocal: Local Whisper transcription runs the openai-whisper library directly on your machine. It requires both ffmpeg (for audio decoding) and the openai-whisper Python package to be installed. No API key or network connection is needed. Install with: uv pip install 'qwenpaw[whisper]'.

backup.title: Backups
backup.description: Backup and restore agent workspaces and configurations.
backup.batchDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} backup(s)? This action cannot be undone.
backup.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this backup? This action cannot be undone.
backup.name: Name
backup.noBackups: No backups yet. Create one to backup your current configuration.
backup.fullBackupDesc: Backup everything including all agent workspaces, global settings, skill pool, and secrets
backup.scopeSecretsHint: Includes model provider secrets (API keys), environment variables, and other sensitive information
backup.securityNotice: This backup may contain sensitive credentials. Agent workspaces include channel credentials (bot tokens, app secrets, etc.), and model provider secrets include API keys. Do not share backup files with others.
backup.searchPlaceholder: Search backups by name or ID...
backup.agentsPlaceholder: Select agent workspaces (leave empty for all)
backup.restoreFullWarning: Full restore will completely replace all contents of the current instance (including all agents, global config, skill pool, and secrets). This action cannot be undone. Related features will be unavailable during restore. Please restart the service after restoration is complete.
backup.noAgentsInBackup: No agent workspaces in this backup
backup.restoreWarningModify: Restoring will modify current configurations. This action cannot be undone.
backup.restoreWarningRestart: Related features will be unavailable during restore. Please restart the service after restoration is complete.
backup.preRestoreBackupContent: The restore operation is irreversible. Would you like to create a backup of the current state first? This allows you to rollback if any issues occur during restoration.
backup.restoreConfirm: I confirm that I want to restore this backup
backup.restoreModeFullDesc: Completely replace all contents of the current instance, including all agents, global config, skill pool and secrets
backup.restoreModeCustomDesc: Select the contents to restore, such as specific agents, config, etc.; existing agents not included in this restore will be preserved
backup.defaultWorkspaceDirHint: If the agent's original workspace path does not exist, the agent will be saved under <default path>/<agent ID>. If it exists, the agent's original workspace path will be used.
backup.restoreStrategyPreserveDesc: Keep this instance's security guards and MCP configuration.
backup.restoreStrategyRestoreDesc: Use the backup's security and MCP configuration.
backup.restoreSuccess: Backup restored successfully. Please restart the service.
backup.restoreSuccessPreserved: Backup restored successfully. Preserved local settings: {{keys}}. Please restart the service.
backup.restoreSuccessWithBackup: Backup restored successfully. Pre-restore backup ID: {{preRestoreId}}. Please restart the service.
backup.restoreTargetBusy: Restore failed because these directories are still in use. Close the browser or process using them, then retry. If they remain locked, restart the system and try again.
backup.detailLoadFailed: Failed to load backup details; restore is unavailable
backup.trustLocalBanner: Local backup - full restore by default
backup.trustForeignBanner: Imported backup - local security and MCP are preserved by default
backup.trustLegacyBanner: Legacy backup - trust confirmation is required before restore
backup.trustForeignDesc: This backup was not signed by this instance. Only continue if you trust the source; local security and MCP settings will be preserved by default when restored.
backup.trustLegacyDesc: This older backup has no local signature. Only continue if you trust where it came from; this instance will sign it before restore.
backup.exportWarningContent: This backup may contain sensitive credential information. Agent workspaces contain channel credentials (such as bot tokens, app secrets, etc.), and model provider secrets contain API Keys. Do not share backup files with others.
backup.importConflictDesc: A backup with the same ID already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?
backup.localModelsNotice: Backup files do not include local model files. For cross-device migration, you will need to re-download the required local models on the target device.

workspace.title: Files
workspace.coreFilesDesc: Bootstrap persona, identity, and tool guidance.
workspace.zipOnly: Only .zip files are supported for upload
workspace.fileSizeExceeded: File size exceeds {{limit}}MB limit. Current file: {{size}}MB
workspace.systemPromptToggleTooltip: Enable/disable this file in system prompt
workspace.memoryFileWarning: MEMORY.md is typically queried on-demand by the agent using tools. Loading it into the system prompt may cause the context to become too long.
workspace.configUpdateFailed: Failed to update system prompt configuration
workspace.attribution: Workspace design partly inspired by the OpenClaw project — thank you! 🐾

agent.pageDescription: Create, configure, and manage multiple AI agents with custom workspaces and identities.
agent.name: Name
agent.deleteConfirmDesc: Agent will be unavailable after deletion, but workspace files will be kept
agent.idHelp: Leave empty to auto-generate. Only letters, digits, hyphens and underscores allowed.
agent.idPattern: ID can only contain letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens
agent.disableConfirmDesc: The agent instance will not start after disabling, but will remain visible in the list
agent.enableConfirmDesc: The agent will be available for switching after enabling
agent.currentAgentDeleted: Current agent has been deleted, automatically switched to default agent
agent.currentAgentDisabled: Current agent has been disabled, automatically switched to default agent
agent.cannotSwitchToDisabled: This agent is disabled, please enable it in the management page first
agent.initialSkillsHelp: Select skills to add from the pool. You can add or remove skills later.
agent.modelHelp: Assign a specific LLM model to this agent. Leave empty to use the global default.

skills.title: Skills
skills.importHubHint: Import a skill from a supported online hub URL into the current workspace
skills.orChooseFromSources: or choose from supported Skill marketplaces
skills.invalidSkillUrlSource: Please verify the skill URL is from a supported marketplace
skills.contentPlaceholder:
[Format]
---
name: skill_name (required, lowercase with underscores)
description: Brief description (required)
---

Skill implementation (Markdown format)

[Example]
---
name: weather_query
description: Query weather info for a city
---

## Features
Query real-time weather data.

## Usage
User inputs city name, returns weather info.
skills.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this skill?
skills.frontmatterRequired: Skills must start and end with ---
skills.editNote: Tip: You can edit skill content, channels, and config here.
skills.createSkillHint: Create a new local skill directly in this workspace
skills.importTimeout: Skill import timed out. Please retry or check your network.
skills.uploadZipHint: Import one or more local skills from a zip file
skills.uploadNoChange: No new skills were imported. They may already exist.
skills.zipOnly: Only .zip files are supported for upload
skills.fileSizeExceeded: File size exceeds {{limit}}MB limit. Current file: {{size}}MB
skills.builtinUpgradeContent: A newer version of built-in skill "{{name}}" is available in the pool. Overwrite the current version?
skills.languageSwitchContent: The following skills have a different language version in the pool and will be overwritten:
skills.overwriteExistingList: The following skills already exist and will be overwritten:
skills.nameConflict: Name conflict detected. Suggested rename has been filled.
skills.uploadToPoolHint: Upload selected workspace skills to the shared local skill pool
skills.downloadFromPoolHint: Download selected pool skills into the current workspace
skills.renamePlaceholder: Suggested rename will appear here on conflict
skills.renameSingleOnly: Rename is available only when exactly one skill is selected.
skills.emptyStateTitle: This agent does not have any skills yet
skills.emptyStateText: This is expected. New workspaces do not come with skills automatically. Download skills from the local pool or create one here to equip this agent.
skills.provideUrl: Please provide a hub skill URL
skills.validUrl: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
skills.noSearchResults: No skills found matching your search

skillPool.description: Shared local skill pool for built-in skills and workspace uploads. External hub imports such as ClawHub or LobeHub are separate.
skillPool.deleteExternalConfirm: This deletes the external skill files at {{path}} from disk.
skillPool.deleteExternalBatchWarning: Selected external skills will be permanently deleted from disk.
skillPool.importBuiltinHint: Update built-in skills to the latest version
skillPool.importBuiltinConflictContent: The following built-ins differ from the current pool copy. Confirm to overwrite them from source.
skillPool.langDefaultTooltip: Keep each skill in its current language
skillPool.builtinLanguageChangeContent: Overwrite the pool copy of "{{name}}" with the {{language}} built-in version?
skillPool.tagsPlaceholder: Select or type to add tags
skillPool.tagTooLong: Tag must be at most {{max}} characters
skillPool.nameConflict: Name conflict detected. Suggested rename applied.
skillPool.deleteBuiltinConfirm: This removes the built-in skill from the pool. You can import it again later from source.
skillPool.deleteConfirm: This removes the skill from the shared local skill pool.
skillPool.externalHubHint: External hub import is separate from the local Skill Pool.
skillPool.updateConfirmContent: Update to version {{version}}? This will replace the current pool copy with the latest built-in version.
skillPool.overwriteTargetsContent: The following existing targets will be overwritten:
skillPool.builtinOverwriteTargetsContent: The following built-in targets have different versions and will be overwritten:
skillPool.renameAndRetry: A skill with this name already exists. Use the suggested name?
skillPool.multiConflictDesc: The following skills already exist. Please resolve conflicts individually and retry:
skillPool.singleConflictRename: "{{name}}" already exists. Rename to "{{suggested}}" to proceed?

oauth.popupBlocked: Popup was blocked by the browser. Please allow popups and try again.
oauth.windowClosed: Authorization window was closed. Please try again.

heartbeat.title: Heartbeat
heartbeat.description: Run HEARTBEAT.md at a fixed interval for self-checks. By default runs silently without affecting current conversations, or optionally send replies to the last chat channel.
heartbeat.runNowSuccess: Heartbeat triggered. Check Inbox or target channel shortly.

cronJobs.title: Cron Jobs
cronJobs.description: Create and manage scheduled tasks that automatically execute at specified times.
cronJobs.templateModalDescription: Pick a built-in template and tweak key parameters in the drawer before saving.
cronJobs.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this Cron Job?
cronJobs.name: Job Name
cronJobs.saveResultToInboxTooltip: When enabled, successful executions with successful delivery are stored in Inbox. Delivery failures are always written to Inbox as fallback.
cronJobs.repeatEnabledTooltip: Enable recurring schedule from this start time

validation.cronRequired: Cron expression is required for recurring schedules.
validation.runAtRequired: Execution time is required for one-time schedules.
validation.repeatUntilRequired: Please select an end date when using "End on date".
validation.repeatCountRequired: Please provide a run count when using "Limited count".
validation.repeatUntilAfterRunAt: The end date must be later than the execution time. Please choose an end date after the execution time.
validation.textRequired: Message content is required when task type is text.
validation.requestRequired: Request content is required when task type is agent.
validation.invalidCronExpression: Invalid cron expression. Please use a 5-field cron format.

cronJobs.taskDescriptionPlaceholder: For simple text tasks, enter the message body to send...
cronJobs.idTooltip: System-generated, non-editable, unique UUID assigned at task creation.
cronJobs.nameTooltip: A friendly name to help you identify this job.
cronJobs.cronTooltip: Define when the task should run
cronJobs.cronExample: Common examples: '0 9 * * *' = 9 AM daily | '*/30 * * * *' = every 30 min | '0 */2 * * *' = every 2 hours | '0 0 * * 0' = Sunday midnight
cronJobs.timezoneTooltip: Timezone for the cron schedule. Default: UTC
cronJobs.taskTypeTooltip: Choose 'text' for simple message tasks, or 'agent' for complex agent workflows.
cronJobs.textTooltip: Simple message task: this is the actual message body. Required when task type is 'text'.
cronJobs.requestInputTooltip: Message content in JSON format. This is what the agent will receive and process. Required when task type is 'agent'.
cronJobs.requestSessionIdTooltip: Session ID for the request context. Use 'default' if unsure.
cronJobs.requestUserIdTooltip: User ID that initiates the request. Use 'system' for automated tasks.
cronJobs.dispatchChannelTooltip: Target channel where the response will be sent (e.g., 'console', 'discord', 'imessage').
cronJobs.dispatchTargetUserIdTooltip: User ID who will receive the response in the target channel.
cronJobs.dispatchTargetSessionIdTooltip: Session ID where the response will be delivered in the target channel.
cronJobs.dispatchModeTooltip: Choose 'stream' for real-time responses or 'final' for complete responses only.
cronJobs.shareSessionTooltip: When enabled, shares session with target user. When disabled, each run creates isolated context with unique run ID. Suitable for independent tasks without memory. Default: enabled
cronJobs.maxConcurrencyTooltip: Maximum number of this job that can run simultaneously. Default: 1
cronJobs.timeoutSecondsTooltip: Maximum execution time in seconds. Job will be terminated if exceeded.
cronJobs.misfireGraceSecondsTooltip: Grace period for missed executions. If a job misses its scheduled time by more than this, it won't run.
cronJobs.executeNowContent: Are you sure you want to execute "{{name}}" now?
cronJobs.calendarEmptyHint: No scheduled jobs yet. Create scheduled jobs to see them on the calendar.

dailyTechNewsBrief.title: Daily Tech News Brief
dailyTechNewsBrief.description: At 09:30 on weekdays, compile trending tech headlines into a short digest.

dailyEveningReflection.title: Daily Evening Reflection
dailyEveningReflection.description: At 20:00 on weekdays, prompt a quick reflection on work completed today.

weekendRelaxationReminder.title: Weekend Relaxation Reminder
weekendRelaxationReminder.description: On weekend mornings, push curated hot movie picks for a lighter break.

pomodoroBreakReminder.title: Pomodoro Break Reminder
pomodoroBreakReminder.description: During work hours, remind every 25 minutes to hydrate or rest your eyes.

petCareReminder.title: Pet Deworming/Vaccine Reminder
petCareReminder.description: On the 15th each month at night, remind pet deworming or vaccine follow-up.

onceTextBirthdayReminder.title: Birthday Reminder
onceTextBirthdayReminder.description: Remind that xx has a birthday on Jan 1.

onceAgentBusinessTripPrep.title: Business Trip Prep
onceAgentBusinessTripPrep.description: Check destination weather and provide trip preparation suggestions.

repeatCountTextMedicineReminder.title: Medication Reminder (14 runs)
repeatCountTextMedicineReminder.description: Remind to take medicine on time for a 14-run course.

repeatCountAgentDietPlan.title: 14-Day Meal Plan
repeatCountAgentDietPlan.description: Generate and send daily meal suggestions for 14 days.

repeatUntilTextWeeklyMeeting.title: Weekly Meeting Reminder (2 months)
repeatUntilTextWeeklyMeeting.description: Send a weekly meeting reminder until the configured deadline.

repeatUntilAgentWeeklySummary.title: Pre-Meeting Weekly Summary
repeatUntilAgentWeeklySummary.description: Before each weekly meeting, summarize the last week's memory.

channels.title: Channels
channels.filterToolMessagesTooltip: Show tool call and output messages to users (turn off to hide)
channels.filterThinkingTooltip: Show model thinking/reasoning content to users (turn off to hide)
channels.streamingEnabledDingtalkHint: Only effective when message type is Card
channels.streamingEnabledFeishuHint: Requires enabling cardkit:card:write permission in the Feishu Open Platform permission management page
channels.ackMessageTooltip: Send an instant reply when a message is received, before agent processing begins. Leave empty to disable.
channels.acceptBotMessagesTooltip: When enabled, messages from other bots will be accepted
channels.dmPolicyTooltip: Control who can interact with the bot via direct message. Open: everyone; Allowlist: authorized users only
channels.groupPolicyTooltip: Control who can interact with the bot in group chats. Open: everyone; Allowlist: authorized users only
channels.requireMentionTooltip: When enabled, bot only responds in group chats when explicitly @mentioned
channels.allowFromTooltip: List of user IDs allowed to interact with the bot. Enable allowlist first, then DM the bot to see your ID in the deny message
channels.allowFromPlaceholder: Enter user ID and press Enter to add
channels.denyMessageTooltip: Custom message shown to users when access is denied
channels.phoneNumberSidHelp: Found under Phone Numbers → Active Numbers in the Twilio Console.
channels.welcomeTextTooltip: Message automatically sent when a user enters a single chat session with the bot for the first time that day
channels.welcomeTextPlaceholder: e.g. Hello! I'm QwenPaw. How can I help you?
channels.wecomSetupGuide: When creating a bot via QR code, please select "Skip Authorization" when asked to authorize bot capabilities. If you select "Confirm Authorization", users other than the bot creator may not be able to interact with the bot.
channels.wecomAuthHint: Scan the QR code above with WeCom to authorize. Bot ID and Secret will be filled in automatically.
channels.wecomAuthSuccess: WeCom bot authorized. Bot ID and Secret have been filled in.
channels.wecomQrcodeFailed: Failed to get WeCom QR code. Please try again.
channels.dingtalkSetupGuide: Scan the QR code with DingTalk to create a bot instantly. A DingTalk app will be created automatically and Client ID / Client Secret will be filled in.
channels.dingtalkScanHint: Scan the QR code above with DingTalk. Client ID and Client Secret will be filled in automatically after authorization.
channels.dingtalkAuthSuccess: DingTalk bot created. Client ID and Client Secret have been filled in.
channels.dingtalkQrcodeFailed: Failed to get DingTalk QR code. Please try again.
channels.dingtalkQrcodeExpired: QR code expired, please get a new one.
channels.qqSetupGuide: Use QQ to scan the QR code to authorize the bot. After scanning, the APP ID and Client Secret will be automatically retrieved and filled in.
channels.qqScanAuth: Scan the QR code to authorize the bot
channels.qqScanHint: Please use QQ to scan the QR code above. Once authorization is complete, the APP ID and Client Secret will be automatically filled in.
channels.qqAuthSuccess: QQ bot authorization successful. The APP ID and Client Secret have been automatically filled in.
channels.qqQrcodeFailed: Failed to retrieve the QQ QR code; please try again later
channels.qqQrcodeExpired: The QR code has expired; please retrieve a new one
channels.atSenderOnReplyTooltip: When enabled, the bot will @mention the sender in its first reply message in group chats. Note: In card mode, @mention only works for enterprise internal members.
channels.voiceSetupGuide: Set up a Twilio account, purchase a phone number, then enter your credentials below. Find your Account SID and Auth Token on the Twilio Console dashboard. The Phone Number SID is listed under Phone Numbers → Active Numbers.
channels.sipSetupGuide: Configure a SIP registrar (e.g. Asterisk, FreeSWITCH) and enter your SIP credentials below. In Dev mode, pyVoIP handles SIP/RTP locally. In Production mode, LiveKit SIP Server is used.
channels.sipModeTooltip: Dev: pure-Python pyVoIP for local testing. Production: LiveKit SIP Server for high concurrency.
channels.sipServerPlaceholder: Leave empty to use built-in registrar
channels.sipDashscopeApiKeyTooltip: API key for Aliyun DashScope STT/TTS. If empty, falls back to the DASHSCOPE_API_KEY environment variable.
channels.livekitRoomNameTooltip: The LiveKit room name to join and wait for SIP calls. Must match the room name in your SIP Dispatch Rule.
channels.xiaoyiSetupGuide: Please create an agent on Huawei Developer Platform and get AK/SK and Agent ID. AK/SK can be found in the credential management page.
channels.feishuRegionTooltip: Choose Feishu for China or Lark for International
channels.feishuScanGuide: Scan the QR code with Feishu to create a bot instantly. A Feishu app will be created automatically and App ID / App Secret will be filled in.
channels.feishuScanHint: Scan the QR code above with Feishu. App ID and App Secret will be filled in automatically after authorization.
channels.feishuAuthSuccess: Feishu bot created. App ID and App Secret have been filled in.
channels.feishuQrcodeExpired: QR code expired, please get a new one.
channels.feishuQrcodeFailed: Failed to get Feishu QR code. Please try again.
channels.wechatSetupGuide: WeChat personal account Bot (iLink protocol). On first start without a Bot Token, a QR code login URL will be printed; scan to authorize. The token is saved locally for future use.
channels.wechatContextTokenLimit: WeChat iLink platform limitation: each user message's context_token allows a maximum of 10 reply messages. This is a hard limit enforced by the platform. It is recommended to disable thinking and tool output, or enable Message Merge to avoid exceeding the limit and causing message send failures.
channels.wechatBotTokenTooltip: Bearer token obtained after QR code login. Leave empty to trigger QR code login on startup.
channels.wechatBotTokenPlaceholder: Auto-filled after QR login, or paste manually
channels.wechatBotTokenFileTooltip: Path to persist the bot token. Defaults to ~/.qwenpaw/wechat_bot_token
channels.wechatMessageMergeTooltip: Merge multiple reply messages into fewer messages to avoid hitting the WeChat 10-message limit per context_token. When enabled with delay 0, all text replies are merged into a single message sent at the end. A positive delay (in ms) merges adjacent messages within that time window.
channels.wechatMessageMergeDelayMsTooltip: Time window for adjacent message merging. Set to 0 to merge all messages into one final reply. A positive value (e.g. 1000) will buffer messages for that duration before sending.
channels.wechatMessageMergeDelayMsValidation: Please enter a valid non-negative integer
channels.wechatScanHint: Scan the QR code with WeChat, then click Save
channels.wechatQrcodeFailed: Failed to fetch QR code, please try again
channels.wechatLoginSuccess: WeChat login successful, token has been filled in
channels.wechatQrcodeExpired: QR code expired, please get a new one
channels.shareSessionInGroupTooltip: When enabled, all group members share the same conversation context. When disabled, each member has their own independent context.
channels.accessControlEnabledTooltip: When enabled, only whitelisted users can interact with this bot. Unknown users will be prompted with their ID and added to the pending approval list.
channels.accessControlDmTooltip: When enabled, only whitelisted users can interact with the bot in direct messages
channels.accessControlGroupTooltip: When enabled, only whitelisted users can interact with the bot in group chats
channels.dmDisabledTooltip: When enabled, the bot will completely ignore all direct messages
channels.groupDisabledTooltip: When enabled, the bot will completely ignore all group messages

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: View and manage active chat sessions
sessions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session?
sessions.batchDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete selected {{count}} sessions?

environments.title: Environment Variables
environments.description: Configure key-value environment variables for agents and skills.

modelSelector.freeBannerText: Free models may have rate limits and limited availability. Refer to the provider for details.
modelSelector.configureApiKey: Configure {{provider}} API Key to use free models
modelSelector.configureApiKeyConfirm: You will be redirected to the Models page to configure {{provider}} API Key. Continue?
modelSelector.oauthDescription: A new browser window will open for you to authorize access to {{provider}}. Your API key will be saved automatically.
modelSelector.oauthWaitingDescription: Please complete the authorization in the browser window.

tokenUsage.title: Token Usage
tokenUsage.noData: No token usage data in the selected period

agentStats.title: Agent Statistics
agentStats.description: View agent statistics for the selected time period.
agentStats.totalSessionsTooltip: Total chat sessions created, each session is an independent conversation context
agentStats.totalMessagesTooltip: Total messages across all sessions, including both user and assistant messages
agentStats.promptTokensTooltip: Total prompt tokens sent to the LLM
agentStats.completionTokensTooltip: Total completion tokens generated by the LLM
agentStats.llmCallsTooltip: Number of LLM API calls, each request counts as one call
agentStats.toolCallsTooltip: Number of times the agent decided to invoke a tool; a single LLM call may produce multiple tool-use intents
agentStats.messageTrendTooltip: Trend comparing user messages vs assistant messages
agentStats.sessionTrendTooltip: Trend comparing new sessions vs active sessions; orange bars are sessions created that day, blue bars are sessions with messages that day
agentStats.tokenTrendTooltip: Trend of prompt and completion token consumption
agentStats.llmAndToolTrendTooltip: Trend comparing LLM calls vs tool-use intents
agentStats.sessionsByChannelTooltip: Distribution of sessions by messaging channel; sessions without a channel are grouped under Console
agentStats.messagesByChannelTooltip: Distribution of total messages by messaging channel
agentStats.noData: No statistics data in the selected period

models.providersDescription: Configure API keys and endpoints for each provider.
models.llmDescription: Set the global default LLM model from an authorized provider. You can choose a specific model for each Agent in the Chat page.
models.customHeadersHint: Appended to every API request, e.g. x-app: cli
models.generateConfigHint: Generation parameters expressed as a JSON object. They will be expanded and passed into the generation request (`openai.chat.completions` or `anthropic.messages`).
models.generateConfigMustBeObject: Generation parameters must be a JSON object
models.modelGenerateConfigHint: Generation parameters expressed as a JSON object for this model. They will be expanded and passed into the generation request. These override provider-level advanced configuration.
models.maxInputLengthHint: Model context window size, controls context compaction threshold (≥1000)
models.protocolHint: Choose the provider API protocol for this configuration.
models.leaveBlankKeep: Leave blank to keep current key
models.openAICompatibleEndpoint: OpenAI-compatible endpoint, e.g. https://api.example.com (append /v1 only if your provider requires it)
models.pleaseEnterBaseURL: Please enter the API base URL
models.selectBaseURLHint: Select the regional endpoint for this provider
models.revokeConfirmContent: Are you sure you want to remove the API key for {{name}}? The current LLM model configuration will also be cleared.
models.revokeConfirmSimple: Are you sure you want to remove the API key for {{name}}?
models.freeModelWarningMessage: Free models may have limited availability. Please refer to the provider's terms of service:
models.noConfigured: No providers configured yet. Select one below to get started.
models.providerIdHint: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens, underscores. Cannot be changed later.
models.deleteProviderConfirm: Delete custom provider "{{name}}" and all its models? This cannot be undone.
models.disableProviderConfirm: Clear API key for "{{name}}"? The provider will become unconfigured.
models.modelDiscoveryUnavailableHint: No available models were found. This provider may not support model list discovery, so please enter the model ID manually.
models.autoDiscoverModelsNoNew: Auto discovery complete. No new models were added
models.clearAllModelsConfirm: Clear all {{count}} extra models? This cannot be undone.
models.localRepoIdRequired: Please enter a model repository ID
models.localFilenameHint: Leave empty to auto-select the best quantization
models.localDeleteConfirm: Delete local model "{{name}}"? The model file will be removed from disk.
models.localDownloading: Downloading {{repo}}... This may take a few minutes.
models.localDownloadNavigateHint: You can navigate away — the download will continue in the background.
models.localDownloadInProgress: A download is already in progress
models.localNoRecommendedModels: This device is not powerful enough to run local models
models.localLlamacppInstallHint: Install the local runtime before downloading or starting a model.
models.localRuntimeComputeHint: CPU is used by default. For GPU acceleration, use Ollama or LM Studio.
models.localRuntimeUpdateAction: Click to download the latest version
models.localRuntimeUpdateConfirmContent: Updating will overwrite the currently installed llama.cpp version. Confirm to start downloading and installing the latest version.
models.localRuntimeUpdateConfirmContentWithServ: Updating will overwrite the currently installed llama.cpp version and stop the currently running model service ({{model}}). Confirm to start downloading and installing the latest version.
models.localNoDownloadedModelsHint: Download a suitable model before starting the local inference service.
models.localEngineStatusHint: Please download and start a suitable model from the list below
models.localServerSwitchConfirm: The current server is running {{current}}. Switch to {{next}}?
models.localModelPathMissing: This downloaded model is missing a local path.
models.localModelsSectionDescription: Downloaded models can be started immediately. Only one model download and one local server instance can run at a time.
models.localAlternativeRuntimeHint: Please try Ollama or LM Studio
models.localAdvancedConfigDescription: These settings apply to the embedded local inference runtime. Max context length changes take effect the next time the local server starts.
models.localAdvancedConfigSaveFailed: Failed to save advanced local settings
models.localMaxContextLengthHint: Maximum token count for the model context window, determining how much history fits in each request. Changes take effect the next time the local server starts.
models.localMaxContextLengthMin: Max context length must be at least {{min}}
models.localServerPortHint: Leave this empty to let llama.cpp bind an available port automatically. Enter a port to reuse that fixed port on future startups. Changes take effect the next time the local server starts.
models.localServerPortRange: Server port must be between {{min}} and {{max}}
models.localServerPortPlaceholder: Leave empty to auto-select a port
models.localGenerateConfigHint: Configure local model generation parameters as a JSON object. These fields will be expanded into subsequent generation requests.
models.localCustomModelHint: Enter a model repository ID. GGUF format only.
models.testConnectionError: An error occurred while testing connection
models.ollamaFetchModelsFailed: Failed to fetch Ollama models. Please check the error details.
models.modelTestFailed: Model validation failed, please check if the model ID is correct
models.modelTestFailedConfirm: Model connection test failed: {{message}}. Do you still want to add this model?
models.autoDiscoveredAndAdded: Auto-discovered {{count}} models and added {{added}} new model(s)
models.autoDiscoveredNoNew: Auto-discovered {{count}} models; model list is already up to date
models.autoDiscoverFailed: Automatic model discovery failed; you can add models manually
models.probeNotSupported: This model does not support multimodal input

agentConfig.title: Configuration
agentConfig.llmRetryEnabledTooltip: Automatically retry transient LLM API failures such as rate limits, timeouts, or connection errors. Applies to new requests after saving.
agentConfig.llmMaxRetriesTooltip: Maximum number of extra retry attempts for a retryable LLM request failure.
agentConfig.llmMaxRetriesMin: Max retries must be at least 1
agentConfig.llmBackoffBaseTooltip: Base delay before the first retry. Later retries use exponential backoff from this value.
agentConfig.llmBackoffBaseMin: Backoff base delay must be at least 0.1 seconds
agentConfig.llmBackoffCapTooltip: Maximum cap for exponential retry backoff delays.
agentConfig.llmBackoffCapMin: Backoff max delay must be at least 0.5 seconds
agentConfig.llmBackoffCapGteBase: Backoff max delay must be greater than or equal to the base delay
agentConfig.llmMaxConcurrentTooltip: Maximum number of LLM calls allowed in-flight at the same time. Shared across all agents; only the first initialization takes effect until restart.
agentConfig.llmMaxConcurrentRange: Max concurrent calls must be at least 1
agentConfig.llmMaxQpmTooltip: Maximum requests allowed within a 60-second sliding window. Requests exceeding this limit wait before being dispatched — proactively preventing 429 rate-limit errors. 0 = disabled.
agentConfig.llmMaxQpmRange: Max QPM must be at least 0
agentConfig.llmRateLimitPauseTooltip: Default pause duration (seconds) applied globally when a 429 rate-limit response is received. Overridden by the API's Retry-After header when present.
agentConfig.llmRateLimitPauseMin: Rate limit pause must be at least 1 second
agentConfig.llmRateLimitJitterTooltip: Random jitter range (seconds) added on top of the pause so concurrent waiters stagger their wake-up and avoid a new burst.
agentConfig.llmRateLimitJitterMin: Rate limit jitter must be at least 0 seconds
agentConfig.llmAcquireTimeoutTooltip: Maximum time (seconds) a caller will wait to acquire a rate-limiter slot before giving up with an error.
agentConfig.llmAcquireTimeoutMin: Slot acquire timeout must be at least 10 seconds
agentConfig.llmAcquireTimeoutGtPauseJitter: Slot acquire timeout must be greater than rate limit pause + jitter
agentConfig.memoryManagerBackendTooltip: Backend for the memory manager. Choose remelight (local files) or adbpg (cloud database).
agentConfig.memoryManagerBackendRestartWarning: Switching the memory manager backend does not support hot reload. Save and restart QwenPaw for changes to take effect.
agentConfig.maxItersTooltip: Maximum number of reasoning-acting iterations for ReAct agent
agentConfig.maxItersMin: Max iterations must be at least 1
agentConfig.autoContinueOnTextOnlyTooltip: If the model ends a reasoning step with only text (no tool calls), inject a hint and run one extra reasoning pass with the same tool policy so multi-step tasks are less likely to stop silently. Turn off to match legacy behavior. May increase token usage when enabled.
agentConfig.autoGenerateSessionTitleTooltip: After the first user message in a new chat, run a short background LLM call to replace the truncated placeholder with a concise title. Costs one extra short LLM call per new chat. Turn off to keep the placeholder and skip the spend.
agentConfig.shellCommandTimeoutTooltip: Default timeout in seconds for the execute_shell_command tool. The LLM can still override this per-call via the timeout parameter. Useful for long-running tasks like compilation or data processing.
agentConfig.shellCommandTimeoutMin: Shell command timeout must be at least 1 second
agentConfig.shellCommandExecutableTooltip: Path to the shell used by execute_shell_command. Linux/macOS: e.g. /bin/bash, /bin/zsh. Windows: supports powershell.exe, pwsh.exe, or POSIX-like shells such as Git Bash. When empty, falls back to the $SHELL environment variable, then to the platform default (/bin/sh on Unix, cmd.exe on Windows).
agentConfig.planModeTooltip: Enable plan mode to use /plan <description> for structured task planning. When enabled, plan tools are registered and the plan panel becomes available.
agentConfig.maxInputLengthTooltip: Maximum input length (tokens) for the model context window
agentConfig.maxInputLengthMin: Max input length must be at least 1000
agentConfig.contextCompactRatioTooltip: Compaction is triggered when the context length reaches this fraction of the max context length
agentConfig.contextCompactThresholdTooltip: Auto-calculated from max context length × compaction ratio. Compaction triggers when context exceeds this value.
agentConfig.contextCompactReserveRatioTooltip: To preserve context continuity, the most recent fraction of context is kept intact after compaction
agentConfig.contextCompactReserveThresholdTooltip: Auto-calculated from max context length × reserve ratio. At least this many tokens of recent context are retained after compaction.
agentConfig.toolResultCompactRecentNTooltip: Splits the message list into two segments: the most recent N messages and older messages, each using a different compaction byte threshold
agentConfig.toolResultCompactRecentNRequired: Recent tool results range is required
agentConfig.toolResultCompactOldThresholdTooltip: Tool results in older messages (beyond the recent N) are compacted when they exceed this byte limit. Must be less than the recent messages threshold.
agentConfig.toolResultCompactOldThresholdRequired: Max characters for tool results beyond recent_n is required
agentConfig.toolResultCompactRecentThresholdTooltip: Tool results in the most recent N messages are compacted when they exceed this byte limit. Also sets the maximum bytes returned per read_file call. Must be greater than or equal to the older messages threshold.
agentConfig.toolResultCompactRecentThresholdRequired: Max characters for tool results within recent_n is required
agentConfig.toolResultCompactRetentionDaysTooltip: Number of days to retain compacted tool result files, expired files are auto-cleaned
agentConfig.toolResultCompactRetentionDaysRequired: Tool result file retention days is required
agentConfig.exemptFileExtensionsTooltip: read_file tool results for these file extensions will use the recent messages threshold instead of the older messages threshold
agentConfig.exemptToolNamesTooltip: Tool results from these tools will use the recent messages threshold instead of the older messages threshold
agentConfig.languageTooltip: Language for agent persona files (SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, etc.). Changing this will re-copy MD files in the selected language.
agentConfig.languageConfirmContent:
Changing the language will overwrite the following files with the new language version:

  SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, PROFILE.md, MEMORY.md, BOOTSTRAP.md, HEARTBEAT.md

If you have customized any of these files, please back them up first. Your other files will not be affected.
agentConfig.timezoneTooltip: Used for scheduled tasks, time display, and agent context. Defaults to your system timezone.
agentConfig.historyMaxLengthTooltip: Maximum output length (characters) for the /history command
agentConfig.historyMaxLengthMin: Max history length must be at least 1000
agentConfig.contextCompactEnabledTooltip: Automatically compact the context to prevent context window overflow
agentConfig.tokenCountModelTooltip: Model name used for precise token counting; set to "default" to use built-in estimation
agentConfig.tokenCountUseMirrorTooltip: Use a HuggingFace mirror site when downloading tokenizers
agentConfig.tokenCountEstimateDivisorTooltip: Divisor for byte-based token estimation (tokens ≈ byte_length / divisor). Recommended value: 3.75 ~ 4.
agentConfig.tokenCountEstimateDivisorMin: Estimate divisor must be between 2 and 5
agentConfig.compactWithThinkingBlockTooltip: Whether to include model thinking blocks when compacting the context
agentConfig.toolResultCompactEnabledTooltip: Compact oversized tool call results to save context space
agentConfig.memorySummaryEnabledTooltip: Automatically generate and save memory summaries during context compaction
agentConfig.dreamCronTooltip: Cron expression for periodically optimizing long-term memories through dream state (leave empty to disable)
agentConfig.autoMemorySearchTooltip: Auto memory search to run on every conversation turn. Each query will automatically invoke memory search capabilities, helping QwenPaw understand you better — but this increases token consumption.
agentConfig.autoMaxResultsTooltip: Maximum number of results returned when auto memory search is enabled
agentConfig.autoMaxResultsMin: Max results must be at least 1
agentConfig.autoMinScoreTooltip: Minimum relevance score threshold (0–1) when auto memory search is enabled
agentConfig.embeddingApiKeyTooltip: API key for the embedding provider; leave blank if no authentication is required
agentConfig.embeddingBaseUrlTooltip: Base URL of the embedding API. Embedding is enabled when both this and Model Name are filled in.
agentConfig.embeddingModelNameTooltip: Embedding model name. Embedding is enabled when both this and Base URL are filled in.
agentConfig.embeddingEnableCacheTooltip: Cache embedding results to reduce repeated computation
agentConfig.embeddingMaxCacheSizeTooltip: Maximum number of entries in the embedding cache
agentConfig.embeddingUseDimensionsTooltip: Use custom embedding dimensions (only supported by some models)
agentConfig.embeddingDimensionsTooltip: Number of embedding dimensions; takes effect when custom dimensions are enabled
agentConfig.embeddingMaxInputLengthTooltip: Maximum input length (tokens) for a single embedding request
agentConfig.embeddingMaxBatchSizeTooltip: Maximum number of items in a single batch embedding request
agentConfig.embeddingRestartWarning: Embedding model config does not support hot reload. Save and restart the service for changes to take effect.

toolExecutionLevel.title: Tool Execution Security
toolExecutionLevel.alertMessage: Configure tool call approval policy to control the security level when agents execute tools
toolExecutionLevel.strictDesc: All tool calls require approval, highest security level
toolExecutionLevel.smartDesc: Low-risk tools auto-approved, medium+ risk tools require approval
toolExecutionLevel.autoDesc: Only tools explicitly marked for approval require approval (default)
toolExecutionLevel.offDesc: Disable all tool approvals, all tools execute automatically

agentConfig.saveLevelFailed: Failed to save tool execution security level
agentConfig.maxContextLengthTooltip: Maximum token count for the model context window, determining how much history fits in each request
agentConfig.maxContextLengthMin: Max context length must be at least 1000
agentConfig.embeddingActivationNote: Embedding is enabled only when both base_url and model_name are set
agentConfig.embeddingEnableHint: Fill in both Base URL and Model Name to enable the embedding feature. API Key is optional.
agentConfig.rebuildMemoryIndexOnStartTooltip: Clear and rebuild the memory search index when the agent starts. Disable to skip re-indexing and only watch for new file changes (faster startup, but index may be out of sync).
agentConfig.toolResultCompactRecentGtOld: Recent messages threshold must be greater than or equal to the older messages threshold
agentConfig.dialogPathTooltip: Relative path for dialog persistence storage (relative to working_dir)
agentConfig.summarizeWhenCompactTooltip: Automatically generate and save memory during context compaction
agentConfig.autoMemoryIntervalTooltip: Trigger auto memory every N user queries. Leave empty to disable periodic auto memory. 1 means auto memory after every query, 2 means every 2 queries, etc. Warning: setting too low (e.g., 1-3) may cause high token usage and heavy background task burden. Recommended: 5 or 10.
agentConfig.autoMemoryIntervalPlaceholder: Leave empty to disable periodic auto memory
agentConfig.recursiveFileWatcherTooltip: Watch the memory directory recursively. Enable to include files in subdirectories like memory/subdirectory/* in vector search indexing.
agentConfig.contextManagerBackendTooltip: Backend type for the context manager. Currently only Light is supported.
agentConfig.backendRestartWarning: Switching backends does not support hot reload. Save and restart QwenPaw for changes to take effect.

tools.title: Built-in Tools
tools.description: Manage built-in tools and their enabled status. Disabled tools will not be available to the agent.

modelConfig.promptTitle: LLM Model Required — Select in Chat After Configuration
modelConfig.promptMessage: Chat requires an LLM model to function. Please configure a model first, then select it from the model selector at the top of the Chat page.
modelConfig.chatDisabledMessage: Chat functionality is disabled because no model is configured. Please configure a model to enable chat.
modelConfig.modelNotConfigured: Please configure a model in Settings before using chat

chat.disclaimer: Works for you, grows with you
chat.greeting: Hello, how can I help you today?
chat.description: I am a helpful assistant that can help you with your questions.
chat.prompt2: Can you tell me what skills you have?
chat.inputPlaceholder: "↑↓" for message navigation · "/" for quick commands ("/approve" or "/deny" during approvals)
chat.emptyOutputError: The assistant returned an empty response.

compact.description: Compact the conversation context; optional instruction supported

approve.description: Approve the pending tool action and continue execution

mission.description: Launch mission mode — Automatically decompose, implement, and verify complex tasks ⚠️ This mode will bypass tool guardrails

skills.description: List chat-available skills and expose explicit skill commands

plan.description: Create a structured plan to decompose the task into subtasks

attachments.tooltip: Supports documents, images, videos, audio and more formats
attachments.tooltipImageOnly: Current model supports image upload only
attachments.tooltipNoMultimodal: No multimodal capability detected for current model, images or videos may not be processed correctly
attachments.fileSizeExceeded: File size exceeds {{limit}}MB limit. Current file: {{size}}MB
attachments.multimodalDisabled: Current model does not support file upload
attachments.multimodalWarning: No multimodal capability detected for current model, images or videos may not be processed correctly
attachments.imageOnlyAccept: Current model only supports image files
attachments.imageOnlyWarning: Current model only supports images, non-image files like videos may not be processed correctly

chat.rateLimitHit: The current model is rate-limited. Try switching to another free model.

turnUsagePopover.ariaLabel: View turn token and context usage

chat.rateLimitMessage: Rate limit reached. Switch to another free model:

speech.transcriptionDisabled: Transcription is disabled. Configure a provider in Settings > Voice Transcription.
speech.fileTooLarge: Recording file is too large ({{size}}MB). Maximum allowed: {{limit}}MB

queue.title: Message Queue
queue.noChatWarning: Please send a message first to create a conversation before using the queue
queue.queueFull: Queue is full (max {{max}} items), please send or remove some messages first
queue.otherTabOwner: This conversation is being sent from another tab. This tab can only add inputs to the queue; all send operations are handled by the other tab.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage security features for tools and skills.
security.toolGuardDescription: Configure security scanning for tool calls. Dangerous operations will require your explicit approval before execution.
security.enabledTooltip: When enabled, tool calls are scanned for dangerous patterns before execution
security.guardedToolsTooltip: Tools that require approval when dangerous patterns are detected. Leave empty to use the built-in default set.
security.guardedToolsPlaceholder: Select tools or type custom tool names
security.deniedToolsTooltip: Tools that are always rejected without asking for approval
security.saveFailed: Failed to save tool guard settings
security.loadFailed: Failed to load tool guard settings

rules.title: Detection Rules
rules.description: Rules define regex patterns that trigger security alerts. Built-in rules can be disabled; custom rules can be added, edited, or deleted.
rules.duplicateId: A rule with this ID already exists
rules.toolsPlaceholder: Leave empty to match all tools
rules.paramsPlaceholder: Leave empty to match all parameters
rules.patternsRequired: At least one pattern is required
rules.patternsTooltip: One regex per line. Matched against tool parameter values (case-insensitive).
rules.excludePatternsTooltip: One regex per line. If any matches, the rule is skipped for that value.
rules.remediationPlaceholder: Suggested action when this rule triggers
rules.autoDenyTooltip: When enabled, tool calls matching this rule will be automatically denied without requiring manual approval
rules.autoDenyEnable: Enable auto deny for this rule
rules.autoDenyDisable: Disable auto deny for this rule

descriptions.TOOL_CMD_DANGEROUS_RM: Detects 'rm' command that may cause data loss
descriptions.TOOL_CMD_DANGEROUS_MV: Detects 'mv' command that may move or overwrite files unexpectedly
descriptions.TOOL_CMD_FS_DESTRUCTION: Detects low-level disk formatting or wiping commands
descriptions.TOOL_CMD_DOS_FORK_BOMB: Detects classic Bash fork bombs and mass process termination
descriptions.TOOL_CMD_PIPE_TO_SHELL: Detects 'curl | bash' patterns used to download and immediately execute remote payloads
descriptions.TOOL_CMD_REVERSE_SHELL: Detects attempts to establish reverse shells or unauthorized network tunnels
descriptions.TOOL_CMD_SYSTEM_TAMPERING: Detects access to cron jobs, SSH keys, or sudo permissions (including reads and modifications)
descriptions.TOOL_CMD_UNSAFE_PERMISSIONS: Detects global permission downgrades (chmod 777) or setting immutable flags
descriptions.TOOL_CMD_OBFUSCATED_EXEC: Detects execution of base64 encoded strings passed directly to a shell interpreter
descriptions.TOOL_CMD_SYSTEM_REBOOT: Detects system reboot or shutdown commands that will terminate the host system
descriptions.TOOL_CMD_SERVICE_RESTART: Detects service management commands that can disrupt system services
descriptions.TOOL_CMD_PROCESS_KILL: Detects process termination commands that may kill critical processes
descriptions.TOOL_CMD_PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION: Detects privilege escalation attempts using sudo, su, doas, pkexec, or runas

shellEvasion.title: Shell Evasion Detection
shellEvasion.description: Configure which shell evasion and obfuscation detection checks are enabled. These checks detect techniques that attempt to hide malicious intent from simpler regex-only detection.

command_substitution.name: Command Substitution
command_substitution.description: Detects $(), backticks, process substitution, and other command substitution patterns

obfuscated_flags.name: Obfuscated Flags
obfuscated_flags.description: Detects ANSI-C quoting, locale quoting, and empty-quote flag obfuscation

backslash_escaped_whitespace.name: Backslash Escaped Whitespace
backslash_escaped_whitespace.description: Detects backslash-escaped spaces/tabs that can alter command parsing

backslash_escaped_operators.name: Backslash Escaped Operators
backslash_escaped_operators.description: Detects backslash before shell operators (;|&<>) that can hide command structure

newlines.name: Hidden Newlines
newlines.description: Detects newlines and carriage returns that could separate hidden commands

comment_quote_desync.name: Comment Quote Desync
comment_quote_desync.description: Detects quote characters inside # comments that can desync quote tracking

quoted_newline.name: Quoted Newline
quoted_newline.description: Detects newlines inside quoted strings followed by #-prefixed lines that can hide arguments

fileGuard.title: File Guard
fileGuard.description: Protect sensitive files and directories from being accessed by agent tools. Paths added here will be blocked across all tool calls.
fileGuard.inputPlaceholder: Enter file or directory path (e.g. ~/.ssh/ or /etc/passwd)
fileGuard.removeConfirm: Remove this path from the protected list?
fileGuard.duplicate: This path is already in the list
fileGuard.saveFailed: Failed to save file guard settings
fileGuard.loadFailed: Failed to load file guard settings
fileGuard.allowPreviewOutsideWorkspaceDesc: Allow previewing files outside the workspace directory in console. Sensitive file protection still applies.

allowNoAuthHosts.title: Allow No Auth Hosts
allowNoAuthHosts.warningDescription: IP addresses in this list can access API endpoints without authentication. By default, localhost (127.0.0.1 and ::1) are allowed for CLI access. Only add trusted IP addresses. WARNING: Adding untrusted IPs poses a serious security risk.
allowNoAuthHosts.removeConfirm: Remove this IP address from the whitelist?
allowNoAuthHosts.duplicate: This IP address is already in the list
allowNoAuthHosts.saveSuccess: Allow no auth hosts settings saved
allowNoAuthHosts.saveFailed: Failed to save allow no auth hosts settings
allowNoAuthHosts.loadFailed: Failed to load allow no auth hosts settings

skillScanner.title: Skill Scanner
skillScanner.description: Automatically scan skills for security threats before enabling or installing. Unsafe skills can be blocked or whitelisted.
skillScanner.modeTooltip: Controls how the scanner handles unsafe skills: block, warn only, or disabled
skillScanner.timeoutTooltip: Maximum time to wait for a scan to complete (5-300 seconds)
skillScanner.saveFailed: Failed to save skill scanner settings

whitelist.title: Whitelist
whitelist.removeConfirm: Remove this skill from the whitelist?
whitelist.addFailed: Failed to add skill to whitelist
whitelist.removeFailed: Failed to remove skill from whitelist
whitelist.removeWillDisable: The skill will also be disabled after removal.
whitelist.removeAndDisabled: Skill removed from whitelist and disabled

scanError.title: Security Issues Detected
scanError.description: The following security issues were found:
scanError.warnDescription: Security issues were found but the skill was still enabled (warn mode):
scanError.moreFindings: {{count}} more issues not shown (see Security → Skill Scanner for the full list).

login.title: Login to QwenPaw
login.firstUserHint: Create your admin account to get started
login.failed: Login failed, please check your credentials

account.title: Account
account.nothingToUpdate: Please enter a new username or password

pluginManager.title: Plugin Manager
pluginManager.description: Install, manage, and remove plugins without restarting the service.
pluginManager.dropSecondary: or click to browse a ZIP file
pluginManager.zipOnly: Only ZIP files can be dropped as files — drag a folder for directory install
pluginManager.restartHint: Some plugins (e.g. hooks, monkey-patches) may require an app restart to fully take effect or be removed.
pluginManager.uninstallConfirm: Uninstall plugin "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone. Some plugins may require an app restart to be fully removed.
pluginManager.author: Author
pluginManager.officialDesc: Install published plugins from the download CDN.
pluginManager.catalogEmpty: No official plugins available (CDN catalog may be empty)
pluginManager.catalogLoadFailed: Failed to load official plugin catalog
pluginManager.marketUnavailable: Plugin Market is currently under maintenance, please try again later

codingMode.title: Coding Mode
codingMode.experimentalDesc: Coding Mode transforms QwenPaw into a lightweight Web IDE with a code editor, file tree, Git integration, and AI-powered coding assistance.
codingMode.experimentalNote: This feature is experimental and still under active development. Some functionality may be limited or change in future updates.
codingMode.selectProjectDesc: Choose a project to work on, or use the default workspace
codingMode.workspaceDesc: Use the current agent's workspace directory
codingMode.cloneNamePlaceholder: Leave empty to infer from URL
codingMode.localPathHint: Enter the absolute path to your local project
codingMode.dropPrimary: Drag a folder here, or click to browse
codingMode.dropSecondary: Drag from Finder or paste a path below
codingMode.pathHint: Please enter the full absolute path (starting with / or ~)
codingMode.importCopyNote: The folder will be copied into coding_projects/. Original files will not be modified.
codingMode.importCopyDesc: Import creates a copy of the folder. The Agent works on the copy and your original files stay untouched. To work directly on the original, use "Open Directory" instead.
codingMode.openDirDesc: Open an existing local directory — no files will be copied

market.startTyping: Type a query above to search the market
market.browseHint: Pick a category or enter a keyword to browse skills in {{providers}}

startup.errorHint: The backend process could not be launched. Check application logs for details.
startup.timeout: Backend failed to start within {{seconds}} seconds.
startup.timeoutHint: Backend failed to start. Please retry, or check application logs for details.

error.SENSITIVE_FILE_BLOCKED: This file is blocked by File Guard (sensitive file protection).
error.OUTSIDE_WORKSPACE: This file is outside the workspace scope. Enable "Allow Console Preview Outside Workspace" in Settings → Security → File Guard.
error.FORBIDDEN: Access denied: insufficient permissions to preview this file.
error.NOT_FOUND: File not found. It may have been moved or deleted. If a relative path was used, please try using an absolute path instead.
